Interface IConstructCurve3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that construct a curve using other geometries and measures.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("F45AE5D3-5A1D-4C09-8512-BD22B79BDC12")]
public interface IConstructCurve3 : IConstructCurve2, IConstructCurve
